items.title: GSRQ: Gain-Shape Residual Quantization for Sub-1-bit KV Cache
items.core_innovation: Sub-1-bit KV cache quantization fixing high-dim K-means bias
items.significance: Enables much longer context windows at lower memory cost

items.title: MosaicKV: Serving Long-Context LLM with Dynamic Two-D KV Cache Compression
items.core_innovation: Compresses KV cache along both sequence and channel dims
items.significance: Higher throughput headroom for million-token contexts

items.title: RaBitQCache: Rotated Binary Quantization for KVCache in Long Context LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Binary-INT4 rotated quantization for sparse attention KV
items.significance: Cheaper, less biased attention-score estimation at scale

items.title: Beyond Activation Alignment: The Alignment-Diversity Tradeoff in Task-Aware LLM Quantization
items.core_innovation: Shows perplexity-based sensitivity mismatches reasoning impact
items.significance: Challenges standard practice in mixed-precision quantization

items.title: Staleness-Learning Rate Scaling Laws for Asynchronous RLHF
items.core_innovation: Formal scaling law linking rollout staleness to LR in async GRPO
items.significance: Guides stable high-throughput RLHF system design

items.title: Message Passing Enables Efficient Reasoning
items.core_innovation: Adds pointwise thread communication to fork-join parallel reasoning
items.significance: Improves parallel scaling as alternative to long CoT

items.title: CAT: Confidence-Adaptive Thinking for Efficient Reasoning of Large Reasoning Models
items.significance: Cuts overthinking token overhead without hurting hard problems

items.title: Theoria: Rewrite-Acceptability Verification over Informal Reasoning States
items.core_innovation: Auditable typed state-transition verification vs opaque LLM judges
items.significance: Bridges formal proof rigor and informal reasoning coverage

items.title: Efficient Multilingual Reasoning Transfer via Progressive Code-Switching
items.core_innovation: Code-switching to transfer English reasoning without distillation
items.significance: Cheaper multilingual reasoning without external judge models

items.title: Learning from Failure: Inference-Time Self-Improvement for Computer-Use Agents
items.core_innovation: Uses failed trajectories for inference-time agent self-improvement
items.significance: Reduces need for costly synthetic success-only training loops

items.title: ComplianceGate: Classifier-Gated Multi-Tier LLM Routing for Regulated Industries
items.core_innovation: PII-aware classifier gates routing across model tiers/regions
items.significance: Practical cost/compliance-aware serving for regulated sectors

items.title: NVIDIA TwoTower: diffusion LM built on frozen autoregressive backbone
items.core_innovation: Diffusion decoding head reuses frozen AR backbone for 2.42x speedup
items.significance: Novel hybrid AR-diffusion approach retains 98.7% quality at higher speed

items.title: Google TabFM: hybrid attention tabular foundation model
items.core_innovation: Zero-shot tabular classification/regression via in-context learning
items.significance: No per-dataset training or feature engineering needed

items.title: Baidu Unlimited OCR: 3B model with flat KV cache for long documents
items.core_innovation: Reference Sliding Window Attention keeps KV cache constant
items.significance: Constant memory for arbitrarily long document parsing, open-sourced

items.title: PorTAL: Portable Task Adapters for LLMs
